# Josh Wolfe

> Josh Wolfe is an AI-native lead full-stack engineer focused on production software systems, AI-assisted engineering workflows, automation, platform rescue work, and forward-deployed technical delivery.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://josh-wolfe.com/) - AI-native engineering, services, portfolio, and contact.
- [Field Notes](https://josh-wolfe.com/blog) - Technical writing on AI-assisted software development, production systems, automation, and delivery.
- [The AI Coding Stack Is Fragmenting, and That Is Good](https://josh-wolfe.com/blog/ai-coding-stack-fragmentation) - Practical guide to choosing between vibe coding tools, agentic coding workflows, review gates, and production controls in a layered AI coding stack.
- [Agentic Workflows: How AI Is Automating the Development Loop](https://josh-wolfe.com/blog/agentic-workflows-ai-development-loop) - Practical guide to agentic workflows, AI coding agents, tool use, review gates, and software development automation.
- [Your Business Probably Needs a System, Not Just a Website](https://josh-wolfe.com/blog/business-system-not-just-website) - Practical guide to small business automation, lead follow-up systems, and website-connected workflows.
- [Where AI Actually Helps in a Real Business Workflow](https://josh-wolfe.com/blog/ai-real-business-workflow) - Practical guide to AI workflow automation, human-in-the-loop approval, and safe AI business automation.
- [The Production Checklist I Want Before Anything Goes Live](https://josh-wolfe.com/blog/production-readiness-checklist) - Practical production readiness checklist for software launches, deployment safety, rollback planning, and post-launch monitoring.
- [How to Turn a Manual Workflow Into an Internal Tool](https://josh-wolfe.com/blog/manual-workflow-internal-tool) - Practical guide to internal tool development, custom business software, workflow automation, and operations visibility.
- [How I Scope a Custom Software Project Before Writing Code](https://josh-wolfe.com/blog/custom-software-project-scope) - Practical software discovery and technical scoping process for custom software, MVP scope, risks, and first-release planning.
- [What a Good Software Handoff Looks Like](https://josh-wolfe.com/blog/software-handoff-checklist) - Practical software handoff checklist for developer transitions, production operations, documentation, runbooks, and ownership.
- [How I Use AI to Ship Software Without Letting It Get Sloppy](https://josh-wolfe.com/blog/ai-assisted-software-development-workflow) - Practical AI software development workflow with planning, review, testing, and deployment discipline.
- [What I Do When a Software Project Is Stuck](https://josh-wolfe.com/blog/production-rescue-playbook) - Practical software project rescue playbook for stalled projects, technical recovery, production risk, and delivery sequencing.

## Primary Topics

- AI-assisted software engineering

- Agentic coding
- AI coding agents

- Manual workflow automation

- Software discovery process

- Human-in-the-loop AI
